name: Sara Al-Shammari
whatsapp_message: السلام عليكم سارة 👋 لاحظنا أنك حصلتِ على 29 في آخر اختبار، وأنا هنا لمساعدتك تحسني هذا الدرجة قبل الاختبار القادم في 6 أيام 💪 هل تحتاجين شرح إضافي أو لديكِ أسئلة؟
action: Call Sara immediately today to understand barriers to her learning, assess her comprehension gaps, and establish a structured study plan with daily check-ins for the next 6 days.
reasoning: Sara has never been contacted despite critical quiz failure (29/100) and being in remedial track, creating a high-risk window where immediate intervention could prevent further deterioration before her next assessment in one week.
